Clementine Kit

Talent Listening Ear - Clementine's Warp Effects will also trigger at the end of turn and add a copy to the Ultra Deck if it was the last card played. For every X Realm Mastery provided by Clementine, base shield is increased.

Strike - Standard Strike.
Defend - Defend. **Warp:** For each 2 hits the enemy will deal, gain extra shield.

1 Cost Matters of the Heart - For every hit the enemy will deal, gain shield. Gain extra shield and retaliate. Inflict 1 Weakness. **Warp:** Dispel vulnerability from self and gain even more shield and retaliate.

3 Cost Rouse - For every 2 shield gained, heal 1 HP. When playing Rouse or at the start of the turn, choose to inflict 1 Madness and 50 temporary Strength Down, or gain shield.

2 Cost Releasing Repressions - Inflict 1 temporary Madness and 1 Weakness. **Warp:** Inflicts 1 extra temporary Madness and inflicts temporary Strength Down

Exalt Peaceful Repose - Dispel Vulnerablity, and 25% of poison and bleed on self. Gain 20 temporary Reinforced.

E1 - For each hit the enemy will deal, exalt gains an additional 1 temporary reinforced.
E2 - Whenever Clementine's Cards enter Ultra Space, deal damage equal to 50% of shield.
E3 - Releasing Repression Warp Effects double.

embeds.title: ‎忘卻前夜 Morimens
embeds.description:
‎這個世界正在死去。

數百年前——「融蝕」悄然降臨，生命，理智，記憶，一切被人類賦予「意義」的東西，都在融蝕中被逐漸抹去存在過的痕跡。

而人們對此一無所知。
面對這隱秘而不可名狀的災厄，彌薩格大學作為為數不多的知情者之一，決意喚醒與災厄同源的力量，連結遊走在瘋狂邊緣的人形武器，來抵抗這一場浩大的危機。

如果一切終將被遺忘，你是否願意作為世界存在過的證明，背負秘密，一路前行？
墓碑為證，願銀鑰指引前路。

歡迎加入，守密人。

身處迷霧英倫，為存亡背負時代秘密
融蝕危機之中，優雅與力量如影隨形
自組卡牌陣容，喚醒災厄同源的祂們
Roguelite闖關，用策略揭開…

```Alva

HP: 350
MOVE VALUE: 3


Gnosis Gimmick: GB-M19 "Justiciar"

• Everytime Alva plays 5 cards in a round, she loads a bullet into her gunblade. She may have a total of 6 Bullets loaded at once, and her cards with the Fire X affix may consume up to the stated amount of bullets to activate their effects. The rules for Fire is stated below.

[ Fire X: Gain Range equal to the bullet count consumed. The closer the target is, deal 5 extra damage per range wasted. i.e: A card with Range 1 and Fire 4 gains +4 Range and deals +20 damage at Range 1. ]
